paper.title_en: Bounds on the radius of outermost photon sphere and black hole shadow in $n$-dimensional Einstein gravity
paper.abstract_en: The photon sphere, which determines the contour of the black hole shadow, provides a direct probe of strong-field gravity. In this work, we derive model-independent bounds on both the outermost photon sphere radius $r_{γ,\mathrm{out}}$ and the shadow radius $r_{\mathrm{sh}}$ for static, spherically symmetric, asymptotically flat black holes in $n$-dimensional ($n\ge 4$) Einstein gravity, supported by an anisotropic matter field. We first establish a rigorous upper bound on $r_{γ,\mathrm{out}}$ under the Weak Energy Condition (WEC), the Strong Energy Condition (SEC), and an asymptotic decay condition on the matter fields, proving $r_{γ,\mathrm{out}} \le \bigl[(n-1)M\bigr]^{\frac{1}{n-3}}$, where $M$ is the ADM mass, with the bound saturated by the vacuum Schwarzschild-Tangherlini black hole. We further discuss the lower bound on $r_{γ,\mathrm{out}}$, clarifying that a conditional bound can be obtained from the innermost photon sphere under an extra monotonicity assumption. Turning to the black hole shadow, we derive both upper and lower bounds on $r_{\mathrm{sh}}$. Making use of the photon sphere upper bound and the fact that, under the WEC and SEC, the effective potential for null geodesics outside the outermost photon sphere is bounded below by that of the vacuum solution with the same ADM mass, we obtain $r_{\mathrm{sh}}\le\sqrt{\frac{n-1}{n-3}}\,\bigl[(n-1)M\bigr]^{\frac{1}{n-3}}$, while for the lower bound, using only the WEC, we prove $r_{\mathrm{sh}} \ge \left( \frac{n-1}{2} \right)^{\frac{1}{n-3}} \sqrt{\frac{n-1}{n-3}}r_H$, where $r_H$ is the horizon radius. Our results provide clear geometric constraints on the observable signatures of higher-dimensional black holes and underline the special role of the shadow as a robust observable.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文推导了高维黑洞光子球和阴影的模型无关界，理论深度高，方法严谨，结果新颖，对黑洞观测有指导意义。
decision.title_zh: n维爱因斯坦引力中最外层光子球半径和黑洞阴影的界
decision.abstract_zh: 光子球决定了黑洞阴影的轮廓，提供了对强场引力的直接探测。在这项工作中，我们为n维（n≥4）爱因斯坦引力中静态、球对称、渐近平坦的黑洞推导了最外层光子球半径r_{γ,out}和阴影半径r_{sh}的模型无关界，该类黑洞由各向异性物质场支撑。我们首先在弱能量条件（WEC）、强能量条件（SEC）以及物质场的渐近衰减条件下建立了r_{γ,out}的严格上界，证明r_{γ,out} ≤ [(n-1)M]^{1/(n-3)}，其中M是ADM质量，该界由真空Schwarzschild-Tangherlini黑洞饱和。我们进一步讨论了r_{γ,out}的下界，阐明在额外的单调性假设下，可以从最内层光子球获得一个有条件的下界。转向黑洞阴影，我们推导了r_{sh}的上界和下界。利用光子球的上界以及在WEC和SEC下，最外层光子球外零测地线的有效势被具有相同ADM质量的真空解的有效势从下方控制这一事实，我们得到r_{sh} ≤ √[(n-1)/(n-3)] [(n-1)M]^{1/(n-3)}；而对于下界，仅使用WEC，我们证明r_{sh} ≥ ((n-1)/2)^{1/(n-3)} √[(n-1)/(n-3)] r_H，其中r_H是视界半径。我们的结果为高维黑洞的可观测特征提供了清晰的几何约束，并强调了阴影作为稳健可观测量的特殊作用。
